scope: read-only audit of whether species-free E1 context uniquely identifies the paired composition

decision_rule.interpretation: if either anonymous prototype or matcher-envelope contexts map at least one percent of samples to multiple exact compositions, paired exact-formula retrieval is not a valid sole free-generation criterion; explicit stochastic composition remains required in either outcome

leakage_boundary: anonymous_stoichiometry, space_group, prototype and matcher keys are audit metadata only and must never enter the denoiser or composition generator
boundary: No optimizer, model forward, tensor condition, L1/M1, oracle model, relaxation, DFT or DFPT is authorized by this audit.
